description: A v2 payload expressing what v1 could not: the transition_state_validation category (absent from LLMFindingCategory), critical severity, and a recommended_action. Maps to one transition_state_entry record summary (machine_screened_needs_attention) and builds one needs_curator_review task.

findings.message: Validated TS lacks the single expected imaginary mode; path validation is inconsistent.
findings.recommended_action: Do not promote to benchmark_reference until path validation is inspected.

expected.recommended_action: Do not promote to benchmark_reference until path validation is inspected.
